fatal_reason: SQL injection vector in run_query.py:87 — unsanitized user input concatenated directly into query string

tier_2.title: SQL injection in run_query
tier_2.summary: User input is concatenated directly into a SQL query string without parameterization
tier_2.rationale: Security breach risk — non-fatal classification on the tier scale, but flagged fatal for the show-stopper boolean (RCE / data exfiltration on real users)
tier_2.severity_reason: Remote code execution and data exfiltration possible via crafted input
tier_2.evidence: run_query.py:87 — f'SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE id = {user_id}'
tier_2.suggested_fix: Use parameterized queries: cursor.execute('SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE id = ?', (user_id,))
